title: Downloading an App 下载APP
scene: 朋友推荐并指导下载新APP

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I heard about a new app for learning languages. What is it called again?
lines.trans: 我听说有一个新的语言学习APP。它叫什么来着？

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: It is called "LingoDaily." You can find it in the app store.
lines.trans: 叫"LingoDaily"。你可以在应用商店里找到。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I searched for it, but there are many similar apps. Which icon is the right one?
lines.trans: 我搜索了，但很多类似的APP。哪个图标才是对的？

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: The real one has a green owl on a yellow background. Make sure it has over ten million downloads.
lines.trans: 正版是一个黄色背景上有一只绿色猫头鹰。确保它有一千万以上的下载量。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Found it! I will tap "Install." How much storage does it need?
lines.trans: 找到了！我点"安装"。它需要多少存储空间？

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: About two hundred megabytes. It should finish in a minute if your Wi-Fi is good.
lines.trans: 大约两百兆。如果Wi-Fi好，一分钟就能下完。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: It is downloading now. Do I need to create an account or can I use it as a guest?
lines.trans: 正在下载。我需要注册账号，还是可以直接游客使用？

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: You can try it as a guest, but creating an account saves your progress.
lines.trans: 你可以先游客试用，但注册账号能保存学习进度。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Okay, I will sign up with my email. This looks fun. Thanks for recommending it!
lines.trans: 好的，我用邮箱注册。看起来很有趣。谢谢推荐！
